title: Feature: Enforce active HexFlo swarm at agent spawn (both Claude Code + OpenCode)

steps.description: Add GET handler for /api/hexflo/tasks/:id that returns task with swarm_status joined from parent swarm
steps.done_condition: GET /api/hexflo/tasks/{id} returns 200 with swarm_status field; 404 for missing task

steps.description: Add swarm_id existence check to pre_agent() in hook.rs — block background agents when SessionState.swarm_id is None (mandatory mode) or warn (advisory mode)
steps.done_condition: pre_agent() blocks background agents without swarm_id; respects enforcement mode; exempt types bypass

steps.description: Extend pre_agent() task validation to check swarm_status from nexus response — block if parent swarm is not 'active'
steps.done_condition: pre_agent() fetches GET /api/hexflo/tasks/{id}, blocks if swarm_status != 'active'; fail-open on nexus timeout

steps.description: Add nexus REST validation to hook-handler.cjs pre-task — fetch /api/hexflo/tasks/{id} and validate swarm_status, respecting fail-open on network error
steps.done_condition: hook-handler.cjs validates task+swarm via REST; blocks on non-active swarm; warns on nexus unreachable

steps.description: Integration test: spawn background agent without swarm → expect exit(2); spawn with stale swarm → expect exit(2); spawn with active swarm → expect exit(0)
steps.done_condition: All 3 test scenarios pass: no-swarm blocked, stale-swarm blocked, active-swarm allowed

steps.description: Update ADR-2603221939 references section to cite ADR-2603232000 as extension
steps.done_condition: ADR-2603221939 references section includes link to ADR-2603232000

mergeOrder: step-1 (nexus endpoint) — no deps, can start immediately
step-2 (SessionState swarm check) — parallel with step-1
step-3, step-4 — depend on step-1 (need the GET endpoint), parallel with each other

riskRegister.risk: Nexus unreachable makes swarm validation impossible — could silently bypass enforcement
riskRegister.mitigation: SessionState.swarm_id check (step-2) works offline since it reads local session file; REST validation (step-3) degrades to advisory with logged warning

riskRegister.risk: hook-handler.cjs uses async fetch but may run in sync hook context on some OpenCode versions
riskRegister.mitigation: OpenCode hook handler already supports async (uses top-level await pattern); verify in integration test

riskRegister.risk: Adding GET endpoint exposes task details — information disclosure
riskRegister.mitigation: Endpoint is localhost-only (same as all nexus routes), no auth needed for local daemon

successCriteria: Background agent spawned without active swarm gets exit(2) in both Claude Code and OpenCode
Background agent with HEXFLO_TASK referencing a completed/stale swarm gets exit(2)
Read-only agent types (Explore, Plan) bypass all checks
Advisory mode downgrades all blocks to warnings
Nexus-unreachable scenario falls back to advisory (no hard failures)
